caption: In a large assembly hall with green textured walls and golden pillars, a man with white hair and a beard, dressed in a light-colored traditional Nehru jacket, stands at a wooden podium delivering a speech. He gestures with his hands as he speaks into two microphones. Below him, a vast audience of people, mostly men dressed in white and light-colored traditional Indian attire, are seated in rows of curved green seats, facing the speaker. The setting is formal, with a high ceiling and architectural detailing on the walls. Across the sequence, the speaker's posture and hand gestures shift slightly as he continues his address, while the seated audience remains attentive and relatively still. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the scene.
